npcs.name: Mother Elara
dialogue: Peace be upon you, wanderer.
In Verdantis's name, we mend body and soul.
Even the gravest wounds yield to Verdantis's power.
Walk always in the light.

npcs.name: Bram
dialogue: Ah, customers! Welcome to Bram's Forge.
You won't find better quality anywhere else.
Every item here has been tested in the field.
Gold well spent is gold well earned!

npcs.name: Pella
dialogue: Ah, adventurers! The Rusty Anchor welcomes you.
You look like you could use a good meal.
The roads have been dangerous lately, I hear.
Rest well -- you'll need your strength.

npcs.name: Elder Cato
dialogue: Ah, brave adventurers! testtown faces dark times.
Ancient evils stir in the dungeons beneath the land.
Seek out the hidden dangers before they find us.
I sense great potential in you. Do not lose hope.

npcs.name: Elena
dialogue: Have you heard about the old ruins?
They say treasure lies within.

npcs.name: Finn
dialogue: I used to be an adventurer, you know.
Then I took an arrow to the knee.

npcs.name: Calla
dialogue: The blacksmith makes fine blades.
But they don't come cheap.
